label: Riftward Sleepcell
description: Riftward Sleepcell is a compact residential unit cut into the bastion’s interlocked hab tiers, its walls cast from black slagcrete and faced with scuffed vitrified panels. A recessed cot-niche, a fold-down work surface, and sealed storage lockers are built into the structure as fixed fittings, conserving space against the city’s dense vertical plan. Lighting remains low and regulated behind grit-proof louvers, with conduit runs and vox-shielding mesh exposed along the ceiling to blunt auroral backwash. The air is filtered through a narrow intake duct fitted with ash screens, leaving a permanent tang of ozone and stone dust in the fabric-lined interior.
